title: aira cespitosa var. glauca
intro: Aira cespitosa var. glauca, also known as the blue oat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. glauca include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially helping to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Aira cespitosa var. glauca is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
